views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Today's caffeine status: cups count, total mg, progress ring toward 400mg FDA limit, caffeine still active in body via half-life decay, and last-drink-to-safe-sleep countdown

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Quick-add a drink with type picker (grid of icons), size selector, auto-calculated caffeine with manual override stepper, time picker defaulting to now

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Date-grouped drink log with per-day caffeine totals, drink-type icons, and swipe-to-delete. Filter by drink type or date range

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Weekly/monthly caffeine trend charts, daily timing heatmap (when you drink most), drink type breakdown pie chart, week-over-week comparison, and personalized insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCups
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of drinks logged today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayCaffeineMg
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all caffeine mg consumed today

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: todayCaffeineMg / dailyCaffeineLimit (0.0–1.0+), where limit defaults to 400mg

viewModelComputedProperties.name: caffeineRemainingMg
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Active caffeine still in body using half-life decay formula: sum of each drink's mg * pow(0.5, hoursElapsed / 5.0)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: estimatedSafeSleepTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Earliest time caffeine remaining drops below 50mg, calculated from last drink using half-life. Nil if already below threshold

viewModelComputedProperties.name: lastDrinkTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Timestamp of the most recent drink today, used for sleep-safety countdown

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Consecutive days where total caffeine stayed at or under the daily limit (400mg default)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: bestStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Longest-ever streak of days within caffeine limit

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageMg
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily caffeine in mg over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyTrendPercent
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Percentage change: (thisWeekAvg - lastWeekAvg) / lastWeekAvg * 100. Positive = drinking more

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverageCups
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily cup count over the last 7 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostPopularDrinkType
viewModelComputedProperties.description: The drink type logged most frequently in the last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: drinkTypeBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All drink types sorted by frequency with count and percentage for pie chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: peakCaffeineHour
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Hour of day (0-23) when user most frequently logs drinks, derived from last 30 days

viewModelComputedProperties.name: chartData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Daily aggregated data for the last 30 days for bar/line chart rendering

viewModelComputedProperties.name: hourlyDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average caffeine consumed at each hour of day over last 30 days for timing heatmap

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Dynamic list of personalized insights: over-limit warnings, trend alerts, timing suggestions, streak celebrations, weekend vs weekday comparison

dailyGoal.description: FDA-recommended daily caffeine limit. User-adjustable. Progress ring shows consumption as fraction of limit. Green under 75%, yellow 75-100%, red over 100%

caffeineAutoCalc.description: When user selects drinkType + size, auto-populate caffeineMg = baseCaffeineMg * sizeMultiplier (rounded to nearest Int). User can override via stepper.

halfLifeDecay.description: Caffeine has a biological half-life of ~5 hours. For each drink, remaining = originalMg * pow(0.5, hoursElapsed / 5.0). Sum across all drinks for total active caffeine.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day counts toward the streak if at least one drink was logged AND total daily caffeine did not exceed the user's daily limit. Missing a day (no entries) breaks the streak.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare rolling 7-day average caffeine vs the previous 7-day window. Show percentage change with directional arrow. Also track cups-per-day trend separately. Flag if weekly average exceeds 80% of daily limit consistently.
insights: Over-limit alert: 'You exceeded 400mg today — consider switching to decaf for your next cup'
Late caffeine warning: 'Your last coffee at 4:30 PM means caffeine won't clear until ~11 PM — this may affect sleep'
Trending up: 'Your caffeine intake is up 23% vs last week'
Trending down: 'Great progress! You've reduced caffeine by 15% this week'
Streak milestone: 'You've stayed within your limit for 7 days straight!'
Weekend pattern: 'You drink 40% more caffeine on weekdays than weekends'
Peak time: 'Most of your caffeine is consumed between 8-10 AM — your body's cortisol is already high then, try delaying to 10 AM'
Drink diversity: 'You've only had espresso this week — try a lower-caffeine option like tea'
Hydration reminder: 'Caffeine is a diuretic — with 3 cups today, aim for extra water'
